summary: First iteration full backend + frontend testing of ART JUNKIE OS. Backend: 17/17 pytest passing (auth, dashboard, customers CRUD+history, leads, measurements+notifications+mine filter, installations+warranty auto-create, work-orders, production, warranties, service-tickets, settings, reports, client OTP flow). Frontend: staff login → dashboard KPIs, /admin/clienti customer create modal, /admin/leaduri Kanban (6 columns), /admin/masuratori measurement modal opens with fields, /client/login OTP with demo_code visible on screen redirects to /client and shows customer dashboard, employee login (masuratori1) redirects to /app/azi and shows only their assigned measurements.

issues: Initial GET /api/auth/me returns 401 before login is stored — expected but produces noisy console errors on every page load. Could suppress by handling 401 silently in auth bootstrap.

action_items: Optional: suppress the /api/auth/me 401 console noise on public pages (bootstrap check) — cosmetic only.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py: cookies use secure=False and samesite='lax'. Frontend and API are on same emergentagent.com host so this works, but for cross-site prod deployment secure=True + samesite='none' would be required.
server.py: no rate limiting on /api/auth/login or /api/client-auth/request-otp — brute force possible. Playbook required lockout after 5 failures is NOT implemented.
server.py get_customer aggregates all history but does not paginate — fine for MVP scale.
OTP request always returns 200 with demo_code regardless of environment — acceptable per spec (demo mode) but must be gated behind an env flag before prod.
test_credentials: admin@artjunkie.ro / ArtJunkie123! (super_admin); masuratori1@artjunkie.ro / ArtJunkie123! (measurement); montator1@artjunkie.ro / ArtJunkie123! (installer); client phone +40721000001 with demo_code returned by /api/client-auth/request-otp
seed_data_creation: None beyond app's own startup seed; test cases create and clean up their own TEST_* prefixed rows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py uses cookie-based session auth. All routes are under /api. Employee shell is served at /app/azi. Client demo OTP is visible on-screen under label 'Demo cod:'. The only console-visible issue is unauthenticated /auth/me 401 on public pages — informational.
